snippet.title: PM Modi meets GE Aerospace CEO, H. Lawrence Culp Jr.
snippet.description:
A convergence of innovation and collaboration! #PMModi engages with @GE_Aerospace CEO, H. Lawrence Culp, Jr. during #ModiUSVisit2023 in #WashingtonDC. Exciting prospects arise as GE's expertise across Power, Renewable Energy, Aviation, and Healthcare intertwines with India's vision for progress and development.

snippet.title: PM Modi meets Chairman and CEO of General Electric H Lawrence Culp Jr in Washington DC
snippet.description:
Prime Minister Modi met General Electric H Lawrence Culp Jr Chairman in Washington DC on June 22. H Lawrence Culp Jr is also the Chief Executive Officer of GE Aerospace.
